---
title: "PyMathon"
description: "Carefully written mathematics: proofs, problem solving, worked examples, and computational exploration where it adds insight."
author: "Ashish K. Srivastava"
comments: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.academic-masthead}
::: {.academic-kicker}
PYMATHON · MATHEMATICAL NOTES
:::

# Mathematics, carefully explained

PyMathon is a collection of rigorous, readable mathematical articles built
around definitions, proofs, examples, and problems.

Computation appears only as a secondary tool for exploration, numerical checks,
or visualisation. The mathematics remains central.
:::

## Scope

The articles emphasise:

- precise statements and complete arguments;
- more than one viewpoint when it improves understanding;
- worked examples and carefully chosen practice problems; and
- computational experiments only where they illuminate the mathematics.

## Articles
